title: 彼が書いたとされる手紙が見つか…
jp: 彼が書いたとされる手紙が見つからない限り、この事件は解決しないだろう。
en: Unless the letter that is said to have been written by him turns up, this case probably won't be solved.
code:
import type { AdnominalPart, GodanVerb, IrregularVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 書く = GodanVerb & { stem: "書"; ending: "く" };
type する = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "する" };
type 見つかる = GodanVerb & { stem: "見つか"; ending: "る" };
type 解決する = SuruVerb<"解決">;

type 彼が書いたとされる手紙が見つからない限りこの事件は解決しないだろう = Sentence<[
  PronounPart<"彼">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<書く, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<する, "Passive">,
  SuffixPart<"る">,
  NounPart<"手紙">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<見つかる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  NounPart<"限り">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdnominalPart<"この">,
  NounPart<"事件">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<解決する, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"ないだろう">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 駅前に新しくできたカフェで働い…
jp: 駅前に新しくできたカフェで働いている友達が薦めてくれた本を、まだ読んでいない。
en: I still haven't read the book that the friend who works at the café that newly opened in front of the station recommended to me.

title: 新人時代は、毎晩のように残業さ…
jp: 新人時代は、毎晩のように残業させられた上に、休日まで取引先の接待に駆り出されて、正直、何度も辞めようかと思わされたものだ。
en: Back when I was a new hire, I was made to work overtime almost every night, and on top of that I was even dragged out to entertain clients on my days off — honestly, I was made to wonder more than once whether I should just quit.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, CopulaPart, CounterPart, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 残業させられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "残業させられ"; ending: "る" };
type 駆り出される = IchidanVerb & { stem: "駆り出され"; ending: "る" };
type 辞める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "辞め"; ending: "る" };
type 思わされる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "思わされ"; ending: "る" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"新人時代">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"毎晩">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"よう">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<残業させられる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"上">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"休日">,
  ParticlePart<"まで">,
  NounPart<"取引先">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"接待">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<駆り出される, "Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"正直">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  CounterPart<"何", "度">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<辞める, "Volitional">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<思わされる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"もの">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 部長に無理やり書かされた企画書…
jp: 部長に無理やり書かされた企画書を、今度は課長に一から書き直させられた挙げ句、結局は元の案に戻されて、もう何も言う気になれなかった。
en: After being forced to write a proposal by the department head, this time I was made to rewrite it from scratch by the section chief, only to have it reverted to the original draft in the end — I no longer had the will to say anything.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, NumeralPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 書かされる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "書かされ"; ending: "る" };
type 書き直させられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "書き直させられ"; ending: "る" };
type 戻される = IchidanVerb & { stem: "戻され"; ending: "る" };
type 言う = GodanVerb & { stem: "言"; ending: "う" };
type なれる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "なれ"; ending: "る" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"部長">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  AdverbPart<"無理やり">,
  VerbPart<書かされる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"企画書">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"今度">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"課長">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  NumeralPart<"一">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  VerbPart<書き直させられる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"挙げ句">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"結局">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"元">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"案">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<戻される, "Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"もう">,
  PronounPart<"何">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<言う, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"気">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<なれる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なかった">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 帝はいたう悲しび嘆かせ給ひて、…
jp: 帝はいたう悲しび嘆かせ給ひて、夜もすがら涙を流させられけるとなむ、語り伝へたる。
en: The Emperor, grieving and lamenting deeply, is said to have shed tears all night long — so the tale has been handed down.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 悲しぶ = GodanVerb & { stem: "悲し"; ending: "ぶ" };
type 流させられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "流させられ"; ending: "る" };
type 語り伝へる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "語り伝へ"; ending: "る" };

type 帝はいたう悲しび嘆かせ給ひて夜もすがら涙を流させられけるとなむ語り伝へたる = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"帝">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdverbPart<"いたう">,
  VerbPart<悲しぶ, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"嘆かせ">,
  SuffixPart<"給ひて">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"夜">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  SuffixPart<"す">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  SuffixPart<"ら">,
  NounPart<"涙">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<流させられる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"ける">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  SuffixPart<"なむ">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<語り伝へる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"たる">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 先日ご注文いただきました商品に…
jp: 先日ご注文いただきました商品につきまして、メーカーの都合により納期が遅れておりますため、今しばらくお待ちいただけませんでしょうか。ご迷惑をおかけいたしますが、何卒ご了承賜りますようお願い申し上げます。
en: Regarding the product you ordered the other day, the delivery date has been delayed due to circumstances on the manufacturer's side, so could we ask you to wait a little longer? We apologize for the inconvenience, and we humbly ask for your kind understanding.
code:
import type {
  CopulaPart,
  GodanVerb,
  IchidanVerb,
  Sentence,
  VerbPart,
  NounPart,
  AdverbPart,
  ParticlePart,
  PunctuationPart,
  SuffixPart
} from "typed-japanese";

type いただく = GodanVerb & { stem: "いただ"; ending: "く" };
type つく = GodanVerb & { stem: "つ"; ending: "く" };
type よる = GodanVerb & { stem: "よ"; ending: "る" };
type 遅れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "遅れ"; ending: "る" };
type おる = GodanVerb & { stem: "お"; ending: "る" };
type 待つ = GodanVerb & { stem: "待"; ending: "つ" };
type いただける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "いただけ"; ending: "る" };
type かける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "かけ"; ending: "る" };
type いたす = GodanVerb & { stem: "いた"; ending: "す" };
type 賜る = GodanVerb & { stem: "賜"; ending: "る" };
type 願う = GodanVerb & { stem: "願"; ending: "う" };
type 申し上げる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "申し上げ"; ending: "る" };

type 納期遅延のお詫び = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"先日">,
  SuffixPart<"ご">,
  NounPart<"注文">,
  VerbPart<いただく, "MasuPast">,
  NounPart<"商品">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<つく, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"まして">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"メーカー">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"都合">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<よる, "MasuStem">,
  NounPart<"納期">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<遅れる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<おる, "Masu">,
  NounPart<"ため">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"今しばらく">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<待つ, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<いただける, "Masen">,
  CopulaPart<"Te">,
  SuffixPart<"しょう">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">,
  SuffixPart<"ご">,
  NounPart<"迷惑">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<かける, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<いたす, "Masu">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"何卒">,
  SuffixPart<"ご">,
  NounPart<"了承">,
  VerbPart<賜る, "Masu">,
  NounPart<"よう">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<願う, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<申し上げる, "Masu">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 恐れ入りますが、会議室の準備が…
jp: 恐れ入りますが、会議室の準備が整い次第、皆様にはこちらへお移りになっていただきますので、それまで少々お待ちくださいますようお願い申し上げます。
en: Excuse me, but as soon as the meeting room is ready, we will have everyone kindly move over here, so we ask that you please wait a moment until then.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 恐れ入る = GodanVerb & { stem: "恐れ入"; ending: "る" };
type 整う = GodanVerb & { stem: "整"; ending: "う" };
type 移る = GodanVerb & { stem: "移"; ending: "る" };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type いただく = GodanVerb & { stem: "いただ"; ending: "く" };
type 待つ = GodanVerb & { stem: "待"; ending: "つ" };
type くださる = GodanVerb & { stem: "くださ"; ending: "る" };
type 願う = GodanVerb & { stem: "願"; ending: "う" };
type 申し上げる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "申し上げ"; ending: "る" };

type くださいます = SuffixPart<"くださいます">;

type 丁寧な会議室案内 = Sentence<[
  VerbPart<恐れ入る, "Masu">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"会議室">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"準備">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<整う, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"次第">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"皆様">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PronounPart<"こちら">,
  ParticlePart<"へ">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<移る, "MasuStem">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いただく, "Masu">,
  ParticlePart<"ので">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  PronounPart<"それ">,
  ParticlePart<"まで">,
  AdverbPart<"少々">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<待つ, "MasuStem">,
  くださいます,
  NounPart<"よう">,
  SuffixPart<"お">,
  VerbPart<願う, "MasuStem">,
  VerbPart<申し上げる, "Masu">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 彼が本当のことを言っているかど…
jp: 彼が本当のことを言っているかどうかは、会ってみないと分からないと思う。
en: I think you can't tell whether he's telling the truth or not until you actually meet him.

title: 来月から残業代が出なくなるとい…
jp: 来月から残業代が出なくなるというのは、要するに給料が減るということだ。
en: The fact that we'll stop getting paid for overtime starting next month basically means that our salary is going down.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, Sentence, VerbPart, NounPart, ParticlePart, AdverbPart, CopulaPart, SuffixPart, PunctuationPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 出る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "出"; ending: "る" };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type いう = GodanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "う" };
type 減る = GodanVerb & { stem: "減"; ending: "る" };

type 来月から残業代が出なくなるというのは要するに給料が減るということだ = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"来月">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  NounPart<"残業代">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<出る, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"なく">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<いう, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"要するに">,
  NounPart<"給料">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<減る, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<いう, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"こと">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 頼まれてもいないのに、彼女は資…
jp: 頼まれてもいないのに、彼女は資料を全部コピーしておいてくれていたらしい。
en: Apparently she had gone and copied all the materials for me in advance, even though no one had asked her to.

title: 息子は来月から一人暮らしを始め…
jp: 息子は来月から一人暮らしを始めるそうで、家具も少しずつ買い揃えていくことにしたみたいだ。
en: My son says he's starting to live on his own next month, and it seems he's decided to gradually buy and assemble the furniture, bit by bit.
code:
import type { AdverbPart, CopulaPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, IrregularVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 始める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "始め"; ending: "る" };
type 買い揃える = IchidanVerb & { stem: "買い揃え"; ending: "る" };
type いく = GodanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "く" };
type する = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "する" };

type 息子は来月から一人暮らしを始めるそうで家具も少しずつ買い揃えていくことにしたみたいだ = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"息子">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"来月">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  NounPart<"一人暮らし">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<始める, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"そう">,
  CopulaPart<"Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"家具">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  AdverbPart<"少し">,
  SuffixPart<"ずつ">,
  VerbPart<買い揃える, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いく, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"こと">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<する, "Ta">,
  SuffixPart<"みたい">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: たとえ全員が反対したとしても、…
jp: たとえ全員が反対したとしても、やらなければならないことはやらなければならないし、やってもやらなくても結果が変わらないのなら、せめて後悔しないほうを選ぶ。
en: Even if everyone were to object, what must be done must be done; and if the outcome won't change whether you do it or not, then at least I'll choose the option I won't regret.
code:
import type { GodanVerb, IAdjective, IrregularVerb, SuruVerb, AdjectivePart, AdverbPart, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type する = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "する" };
type やる = GodanVerb & { stem: "や"; ending: "る" };
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type 変わる = GodanVerb & { stem: "変わ"; ending: "る" };
type 選ぶ = GodanVerb & { stem: "選"; ending: "ぶ" };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };
type 反対する = SuruVerb<"反対">;
type 後悔する = SuruVerb<"後悔">;

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"たとえ">,
  NounPart<"全員">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<反対する, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<する, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<やる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なけ">,
  ParticlePart<"れば">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Nai">,

  NounPart<"こと">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<やる, "Nai">,
  SuffixPart<"なけ">,
  ParticlePart<"れば">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Nai">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Basic">,
  ParticlePart<"し">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<やる, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<やる, "Nai">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  NounPart<"結果">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<変わる, "Nai">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Basic">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  ParticlePart<"なら">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"せめて">,
  VerbPart<後悔する, "Nai">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Basic">,
  NounPart<"ほう">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<選ぶ, "Dictionary">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: もし君があの便に乗っていなかっ…
jp: もし君があの便に乗っていなかったら、僕たちは今ごろ出会ってもいなかったはずだと思うと、遅れた電車にすら感謝したくなる。
en: When I think that if you hadn't been on that flight, by now we wouldn't even have met, I find myself wanting to be grateful to that very train that ran late.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, AdnominalPart, AdverbPart, CopulaPart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 乗る = GodanVerb & { stem: "乗"; ending: "る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };
type 出会う = GodanVerb & { stem: "出会"; ending: "う" };
type 思う = GodanVerb & { stem: "思"; ending: "う" };
type 遅れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "遅れ"; ending: "る" };
type 感謝する = SuruVerb<"感謝">;
type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"もし">,
  PronounPart<"君">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  AdnominalPart<"あの">,
  NounPart<"便">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<乗る, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "MasuStem">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Past">,
  SuffixPart<"ら">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  PronounPart<"僕">,
  SuffixPart<"たち">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdverbPart<"今ごろ">,
  VerbPart<出会う, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<いる, "MasuStem">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Past">,
  NounPart<"はず">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<思う, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<遅れる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"電車">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  SuffixPart<"すら">,
  VerbPart<感謝する, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"たく">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Dictionary">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 課長は、来週までに資料をまとめ…
jp: 課長は、来週までに資料をまとめておくようにと部下に言ったそうだが、本人はそんなことは頼んでいないと言い張っているらしい。
en: I hear the section chief told his subordinate to have the materials put together by next week, but apparently the man himself insists he asked for no such thing.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, AdnominalPart, CopulaPart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type まとめる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "まとめ"; ending: "る" };
type おく = GodanVerb & { stem: "お"; ending: "く" };
type 言う = GodanVerb & { stem: "言"; ending: "う" };
type 頼む = GodanVerb & { stem: "頼"; ending: "む" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 言い張る = GodanVerb & { stem: "言い張"; ending: "る" };
type らしい = IAdjective & { stem: "らし"; ending: "い" };

type 文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"課長">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"来週">,
  ParticlePart<"まで">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  NounPart<"資料">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<まとめる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<おく, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"よう">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  NounPart<"部下">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<言う, "Ta">,
  AdnominalPart<"そう">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"本人">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdnominalPart<"そんな">,
  NounPart<"こと">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<頼む, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<言い張る, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Dictionary">,
  AdjectivePart<らしい, "Basic">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 天気予報では明日は一日中晴れる…
jp: 天気予報では明日は一日中晴れると言っていたはずなのに、出かける頃には雨が降り出しそうな空模様で、傘を持っていくべきか迷っている。
en: The forecast was supposed to have said it would be clear all day tomorrow, yet by the time I head out the sky looks like it is about to start raining, and I am torn over whether I should take an umbrella.
code:
import type { CopulaPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, AdverbPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 晴れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "晴れ"; ending: "る" };
type 言う = GodanVerb & { stem: "言"; ending: "う" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 出かける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "出かけ"; ending: "る" };
type 降り出す = GodanVerb & { stem: "降り出"; ending: "す" };
type 持つ = GodanVerb & { stem: "持"; ending: "つ" };
type いく = GodanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "く" };
type 迷う = GodanVerb & { stem: "迷"; ending: "う" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"天気予報">,
  ParticlePart<"で">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"明日">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdverbPart<"一日中">,
  VerbPart<晴れる, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  VerbPart<言う, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"はず">,
  SuffixPart<"な">,
  ParticlePart<"のに">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  VerbPart<出かける, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"頃">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"雨">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<降り出す, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"そう">,
  SuffixPart<"な">,
  NounPart<"空模様">,
  CopulaPart<"Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"傘">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<持つ, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いく, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"べき">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  VerbPart<迷う, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Dictionary">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 祖母は若い頃、戦争さえなければ…
jp: 祖母は若い頃、戦争さえなければ女学校の先生になっていたかもしれないと、遠くを見るような目でよく語っていたと母から聞いた。
en: I heard from my mother that my grandmother, in her youth, used to often say — with eyes that seemed to gaze into the distance — that if only there had been no war, she might have become a girls'-school teacher.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, NaAdjective, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 若い = IAdjective & { stem: "若"; ending: "い" };
type 遠い = IAdjective & { stem: "遠"; ending: "い" };
type いい = IAdjective & { stem: "い"; ending: "い"; irregular: true };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };
type よう = NaAdjective & { stem: "よう" };

type なる = GodanVerb & { stem: "な"; ending: "る" };
type 語る = GodanVerb & { stem: "語"; ending: "る" };
type 聞く = GodanVerb & { stem: "聞"; ending: "く" };
type 見る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "見"; ending: "る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type しれる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "しれ"; ending: "る" };

type 祖母の話 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"祖母">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  AdjectivePart<若い, "Basic">,
  NounPart<"頃">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"戦争">,
  ParticlePart<"さえ">,
  SuffixPart<"なけ">,
  ParticlePart<"れば">,
  NounPart<"女学校">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"先生">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<なる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"か">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<しれる, "MasuStem">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Basic">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdjectivePart<遠い, "Adverbial">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<見る, "Dictionary">,
  AdjectivePart<よう, "Basic">,
  NounPart<"目">,
  ParticlePart<"で">,
  AdjectivePart<いい, "Adverbial">,
  VerbPart<語る, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  NounPart<"母">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  VerbPart<聞く, "Ta">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 値段が高かったので一度は諦めた…
jp: 値段が高かったので一度は諦めたんですが、店員さんがあんまり熱心に勧めてくるものだから、つい買ってしまいました。
en: Since it was expensive I gave up on it once, but the shop clerk kept recommending it so enthusiastically that I ended up buying it after all.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, AdverbPart, CopulaPart, CounterPart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, IrregularVerb, NaAdjective, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 高い = IAdjective & { stem: "高"; ending: "い" };
type 諦める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "諦め"; ending: "る" };
type 熱心 = NaAdjective & { stem: "熱心" };
type 勧める = IchidanVerb & { stem: "勧め"; ending: "る" };
type くる = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "くる" };
type 買う = GodanVerb & { stem: "買"; ending: "う" };
type しまう = GodanVerb & { stem: "しま"; ending: "う" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"値段">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  AdjectivePart<高い, "Past">,
  ParticlePart<"ので">,
  CounterPart<"一", "度">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  VerbPart<諦める, "Ta">,
  SuffixPart<"ん">,
  CopulaPart<"Polite">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"店員">,
  SuffixPart<"さん">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  AdverbPart<"あんまり">,
  AdjectivePart<熱心, "Adverbial">,
  VerbPart<勧める, "Te">,
  VerbPart<くる, "Dictionary">,
  NounPart<"もの">,
  CopulaPart<"Plain">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"つい">,
  VerbPart<買う, "Te">,
  VerbPart<しまう, "MasuPast">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 雨が降っても降らなくても遠足は…
jp: 雨が降っても降らなくても遠足は予定通り行うと連絡が来ていたので、子どもたちは前の晩から興奮して、なかなか寝つけなかったらしい。
en: We'd been told the excursion would go ahead as scheduled whether or not it rained, so the kids apparently got so excited from the night before that they could hardly fall asleep.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, IrregularVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 降る = GodanVerb & { stem: "降"; ending: "る" };
type 行う = GodanVerb & { stem: "行"; ending: "う" };
type 来る = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "来る" };
type いる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "い"; ending: "る" };
type 興奮する = SuruVerb<"興奮">;
type 寝つける = IchidanVerb & { stem: "寝つけ"; ending: "る" };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };

type 入力文 = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"雨">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<降る, "Te">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<降る, "Nakute">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  NounPart<"遠足">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"予定">,
  SuffixPart<"通り">,
  VerbPart<行う, "Dictionary">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  NounPart<"連絡">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<来る, "Te">,
  VerbPart<いる, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"ので">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"子ど">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  SuffixPart<"たち">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  NounPart<"前">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"晩">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  VerbPart<興奮する, "Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdverbPart<"なかなか">,
  VerbPart<寝つける, "MasuStem">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Past">,
  SuffixPart<"らしい">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: せっかく早起きして作ったお弁当…
jp: せっかく早起きして作ったお弁当を、家に忘れて出てきてしまったが、おかげで久しぶりに同僚と外で昼ご飯を食べられて、それはそれで悪くなかった。
en: I went to the trouble of getting up early to make a bento, but I left it at home when I went out, though thanks to that I got to have lunch outside with a colleague for the first time in a while, which wasn't so bad in its own way.
code:
import type { AdjectivePart, AdverbPart, GodanVerb, IAdjective, IchidanVerb, IrregularVerb, NaAdjective, NounPart, ParticlePart, PronounPart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuruVerb, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 早起きする = SuruVerb<"早起き">;
type 作る = GodanVerb & { stem: "作"; ending: "る" };
type 忘れる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "忘れ"; ending: "る" };
type 出る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "出"; ending: "る" };
type くる = IrregularVerb & { dictionary: "くる" };
type しまう = GodanVerb & { stem: "しま"; ending: "う" };
type 食べられる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "食べられ"; ending: "る" };
type 久しぶり = NaAdjective & { stem: "久しぶり" };
type 悪い = IAdjective & { stem: "悪"; ending: "い" };
type ない = IAdjective & { stem: "な"; ending: "い" };

type Output = Sentence<[
  AdverbPart<"せっかく">,
  VerbPart<早起きする, "Te">,
  VerbPart<作る, "Ta">,
  NounPart<"お弁当">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"家">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<忘れる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<出る, "Te">,
  VerbPart<くる, "Te">,
  VerbPart<しまう, "Ta">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"おかげ">,
  ParticlePart<"で">,
  AdjectivePart<久しぶり, "Adverbial">,
  NounPart<"同僚">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  NounPart<"外">,
  ParticlePart<"で">,
  NounPart<"昼ご飯">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<食べられる, "Te">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  PronounPart<"それ">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PronounPart<"それ">,
  ParticlePart<"で">,
  AdjectivePart<悪い, "Adverbial">,
  AdjectivePart<ない, "Past">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 立入禁止区域につき、関係者以外…
jp: 立入禁止区域につき、関係者以外の者は、いかなる理由があろうとも、この門より先に立ち入るべからず。
en: As this is a restricted area, persons other than authorized personnel must not, for any reason whatsoever, pass beyond this gate.
code:
import type { AdnominalPart, GodanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type つく = GodanVerb & { stem: "つ"; ending: "く" };
type ある = GodanVerb & { stem: "あ"; ending: "る" };
type 立ち入る = GodanVerb & { stem: "立ち入"; ending: "る" };

type 立入禁止区域につき関係者以外の者はいかなる理由があろうともこの門より先に立ち入るべからず = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"立入禁止区域">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<つく, "MasuStem">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"関係者">,
  NounPart<"以外">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"者">,
  ParticlePart<"は">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdnominalPart<"いかなる">,
  NounPart<"理由">,
  ParticlePart<"が">,
  VerbPart<ある, "Volitional">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdnominalPart<"この">,
  NounPart<"門">,
  ParticlePart<"より">,
  NounPart<"先">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<立ち入る, "Dictionary">,
  SuffixPart<"べ">,
  ParticlePart<"から">,
  SuffixPart<"ず">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;

title: 返済の期日を過ぎてなお一円も支…
jp: 返済の期日を過ぎてなお一円も支払われぬとあらば、契約に定むるところに従い、しかるべき法的措置を取らざるを得ない。
en: If, even after the repayment deadline has passed, not a single yen has been paid, then in accordance with what the contract stipulates, we shall have no choice but to take appropriate legal measures.
code:
import type { AdnominalPart, AdverbPart, CounterPart, GodanVerb, IchidanVerb, NounPart, ParticlePart, PunctuationPart, Sentence, SuffixPart, VerbPart } from "typed-japanese";

type 過ぎる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "過ぎ"; ending: "る" };
type 支払われる = IchidanVerb & { stem: "支払われ"; ending: "る" };
type 従う = GodanVerb & { stem: "従"; ending: "う" };
type 得る = IchidanVerb & { stem: "得"; ending: "る" };

type 返済の期日を過ぎてなお一円も支払われぬとあらば契約に定むるところに従いしかるべき法的措置を取らざるを得ない = Sentence<[
  NounPart<"返済">,
  ParticlePart<"の">,
  NounPart<"期日">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<過ぎる, "Te">,
  AdverbPart<"なお">,
  CounterPart<"一", "円">,
  ParticlePart<"も">,
  VerbPart<支払われる, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"ぬ">,
  ParticlePart<"と">,
  SuffixPart<"あらば">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  NounPart<"契約">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  SuffixPart<"定むる">,
  NounPart<"ところ">,
  ParticlePart<"に">,
  VerbPart<従う, "MasuStem">,
  PunctuationPart<"、">,
  AdnominalPart<"しかる">,
  SuffixPart<"べき">,
  NounPart<"法">,
  SuffixPart<"的">,
  NounPart<"措置">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  SuffixPart<"取らざる">,
  ParticlePart<"を">,
  VerbPart<得る, "MasuStem">,
  SuffixPart<"ない">,
  PunctuationPart<"。">
]>;
